note: Governed dev→release promotion of the AG-PROMPT-365 SWIFT/BIC context-gate fix (AG-PROMPT-366). Only allow-listed file changed since the AG-364 promotion: src/detection/swiftBicValidation.ts. AG-365 promoted the financial-context-proximity gate (Gate 3) from SOFT/informational to HARD — a bare 8/11-char uppercase token whose positions 4-5 structurally form a valid ISO 3166-1 country code (e.g. ALMAVIVA -> VI, BASELINE -> LI) no longer produces a user-facing global-swift signal unless nearby text supports a banking/payment interpretation (keywords: swift, bic, iban, bank, routing, wire, transfer, payment, account, invoice, sepa, remittance, beneficiary, + Nordic/German variants). Explicit labels (SWIFT: DEUTDEFF, BIC DEUTDEFFXXX, Beneficiary bank BIC: NEDSZAJJ) still trigger. No manifest, permission, or host-scope change in this promotion (AG-363 scope narrowing carried forward unchanged). tsc 0 errors; CORE 49/49 (incl. test-swift-validation-gates 29/29); Chrome build 34/34 + 20/20 consumer-copy; Firefox build 25/25; release gate 10/10. Pre-existing unrelated failure test-ticket-suppression B.1 (not in CORE tier, not release-gated, confirmed present on unmodified dev HEAD via git stash in AG-365) does not block this promotion. Final ZIP artifact hygiene: clean — no wildcard host access, no <all_urls>, no AgentGuard/agentguard/AG-PROMPT branding leaks, no .map/.ts files, no debugger; statement, no dev URL artifacts (http://127.0.0.1/http://localhost); the single 'onerror=' occurrence in content.js is a FileReader.onerror JS property assignment (not an inline HTML handler) — benign. Ai Notice product name present; chatgpt.com/claude.ai/gemini.google.com/copilot.microsoft.com present; connect-src present. Permissions: ['storage'] only (Chrome); no wildcard host access; connect-src 'none'. No store upload; no GitHub Release.
